# MP HTML fixtures

Saved snapshots of public Mountain Project route pages, used to test `lib/mp-scraper.ts`.
Re-fetch periodically (annually) and re-run tests to detect MP markup drift.

| File | Route | Notes |
|------|-------|-------|
| 105924807.html | The Nose, El Capitan | Long multi-pitch, deeply nested area |
| 105748786.html | The Naked Edge | Trad classic, Eldorado Canyon |
| 105748131.html | High Exposure | Boulder, CO |
